records.question: Which genres include the game Senran Kagura Burst: Guren no Sh?jo-tachi?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.id FROM genre
JOIN game ON genre.id = game.genre_id
WHERE game.game_name = 'Senran Kagura Burst: Guren no Sh?jo-tachi'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM genre AS T1 INNER JOIN game AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id WHERE T2.game_name = 'Senran Kagura Burst: Guren no Sh?jo-tachi'
